title: SGA SMB Server Recovery Runbook
goal: Restore write access to the shared normalized database and verify SGA uses server mode.
issue_summary: SMB auth fails with password-expired errors (WinError 1330 / system error 2242).
Client falls back to local unified_db and lab changes may not persist to server.
Server copy reported smart_label.py NameError for get_base_dir in one environment.
prompt_for_agent: You are a Windows/Python troubleshooting agent. Work in C:\Users\Administrador\Desktop\SGAv1.01 on ServerWebQB. Fix SMB access for \\ServerWebQB\SGA_Database and ensure SGA writes to the server shared database. Do not expose passwords in logs. Steps: (1) verify SMB share path and connectivity, (2) reset sga_user password and prevent expiration, (3) clear stale SMB sessions/cached credentials, (4) reconnect to \\192.168.2.237\SGA_Database interactively, (5) verify Python app resolves server path, (6) fix smart_label.py if get_base_dir is missing, (7) run final validation commands and provide PASS/FAIL with evidence.
prerequisites: Run commands as Administrator on ServerWebQB.
Know the new password policy for account sga_user

steps.name: Confirm share path
steps.success_criteria: SGA_Database path is shown and points to the expected unified_db folder.

steps.name: Locate project Python
commands: if (-not $py) { Get-ChildItem -Path . -Recurse -Filter python.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 10 -ExpandProperty FullName } else { Write-Host "Python detectado en: $py" }
steps.success_criteria: $py resolves to a valid python.exe path.

steps.name: Repair smart_label helper if missing
steps.success_criteria: smart_label.py contains def get_base_dir and SmartLabelManager can initialize.

steps.name: Reset SMB account password
steps.success_criteria: Password reset completes without error and expiration is disabled.

steps.name: Clear stale SMB sessions
steps.success_criteria: No stale entries for ServerWebQB/192.168.2.237 remain.

steps.name: Reconnect interactively
steps.success_criteria: net use succeeds and Test-Path returns True.

steps.name: Verify app resolves server DB
commands: & 'C:/Users/QB_DESARROLLO/Desktop/SGAv1.01/sga_web/.venv/Scripts/python.exe' -c "import sga_web.db_connector as dc; cfg=dc.load_server_config('sga_web/server_config.json'); p,s=dc.get_db_path(cfg); print('DB_PATH=',p); print('DB_SOURCE=',s)"

& 'C:/Users/QB_DESARROLLO/Desktop/SGAv1.01/sga_web/.venv/Scripts/python.exe' -c "from smart_label import SmartLabelManager; m=SmartLabelManager(); print('SMART_LABEL_DATA_DIR=', m.data_dir); print('SMART_LABEL_MODE=', m.connection_mode)"
steps.success_criteria: DB_SOURCE=server and SMART_LABEL_MODE indicates server (or not local fallback).

steps.name: Final write test
commands: & 'C:/Users/QB_DESARROLLO/Desktop/SGAv1.01/sga_web/.venv/Scripts/python.exe' -c "from smart_label import SmartLabelManager; s=SmartLabelManager(); ok=s.save_products(); print('SAVE_OK=', ok); print('STATUS=', s.get_last_save_status())"

expected_final_state: SMB share is reachable from client with sga_user.
SGA resolves database path to server share, not local fallback.
Normalized database save succeeds with no credential errors.
